project.name: Centro Educacional Favo de Mel
project.audience: Brazilian parents seeking a warm, premium, and trustworthy kindergarten

art_direction.description: An award-worthy (Awwwards-level) editorial approach blending organic warmth with structural precision. Moving away from standard primary colors, it uses a sophisticated palette of warm amber, soft cream, and deep moss green. It combines bold typographic tension (Cabinet Grotesk + Cormorant Garamond) with subtle honeycomb motifs, massive negative space, and deliberate, clipped real photography. Prioritize motion and craft over everything else.

primary_heading.usage: Massive kinetic hero text, section titles. Must use tracking-tighter. No generic sans.

editorial_accent.usage: Numbered manifesto chapters (01, 02, 03) and pull quotes. Adds a high-end editorial feel.

body.usage: All body copy, forms, and small labels. Clean and highly legible.

typography.guidelines: Never use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Headings must be asymmetrical. Large typographic contrast (e.g., text-8xl next to text-sm).

colors.rules: Avoid generic SaaS blue or bright red. Color exists to guide action and emotion. Use the Dark Section (#212B22) for the Footer and Manifesto to create dramatic rhythm.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(26,26,26,0.1) for grid divisions (Swiss Grid feel).
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle SVG noise overlay fixed at pointer-events-none over the entire body (opacity 2%).
visual_enhancers.shapes: Use subtle hexagonal clip-paths (`clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 25%, 100% 75%, 50% 100%, 0% 75%, 0% 25%)`) selectively for image frames or hover reveals.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For sticky navigation: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/70 with a delicate 1px bottom border. NO purely transparent headers.

layouts.hero: Kinetic typography 'FAVO DE MEL' split into lines, taking up 80% of screen. Masked line-by-line reveal on load. A clipped image sits tightly aligned to a grid edge. Add a subtle parallax effect on scroll.
layouts.manifesto: Asymmetrical layout. Large serif numbers (01, 02, 03) in Cormorant Garamond on the left. Heading and text on the right. Huge padding (py-32).
layouts.marquee: Slow moving editorial ribbon. Font: Cabinet Grotesk, text-8xl, uppercase, outline style (text-transparent stroke-1 stroke-black).
layouts.programs_turmas: Bento grid (Tetris mode). 3 blocks: Berçário, Maternal, Jardim. Dense layout with high-quality imagery.
layouts.gallery: Grid with mixed aspect ratios (tall, square, wide). Clipped/masked frames that reveal full color on hover.
layouts.contact_footer: Massive typography 'VENHA NOS CONHECER' (text-[10vw]). Contact details (Google 4.4 rating, address, phone) in a sharp grid. Dark background (#212B22).

motion.hero_reveal: staggerChildren with y: 100, opacity: 0 to y: 0, opacity: 1 and a custom cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1).
motion.scroll_animations: WhileInView transitions. Elements slide up slightly (y: 30) with 0.8s duration.
motion.parallax: Use framer-motion `useScroll` and `useTransform` for images to move slower than the page.

components.name: KineticHeroText
components.purpose: A custom component for splitting text and masking it with overflow-hidden wrappers for a line-by-line reveal.

components.name: HexagonImage
components.purpose: Applies a honeycomb clip-path to an image.

image_urls.description: Girl playing in warm sunlight, sets the premium emotional tone.
Children on playground/court in warm sunlight.
Macro honeycomb geometric texture, can be used at 5% opacity for background depth.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Amber text against Cream background passes APCA. Use Moss Green (#2C402E) for small body text to guarantee legibility.
accessibility.motion: Respect `prefers-reduced-motion`. Disable parallax and heavy kinetic reveals for these users.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="enrollment-button"`).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do not center-align the main app layout. Embrace asymmetric, editorial layouts with wide margins.
Do NOT use complete `transparent` background in headers, overlays, or any surface with content underneath. Use a blur/glassmorphism or solid color.
Use Generous Spacing: apply 2-3x more spacing (py-24, py-32) than standard Tailwind templates to achieve luxury.
Never use placeholder URLs. Use the provided image_urls for all visual assets.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
Typography: Apply 'tracking-tighter' to Cabinet Grotesk headings, and 'tracking-widest' uppercase to small labels. DO NOT USE INTER OR ROBOTO.
